line_completion_label: Use the marked row clue and visible cells in {line_label}. Which labeled strip is correct?
Select the row-strip option that satisfies the marked clue and matches the visible cells in {line_label}.
Which option should replace the unknown cells in {line_label}?
Choose the labeled strip that completes {line_label} without violating its clue.
candidate_solution_label: Which candidate grid satisfies all visible row and column clues?
Select the filled-grid option that matches every row clue and every column clue.
Choose the candidate solution consistent with all nonogram clues.
Which labeled filled grid is the valid nonogram solution for these clues?
Use both clue rails to identify the correct candidate grid.

task:line_completion_label_query.answer_instruction: the selected strip option letter as a string
task:line_completion_label_query.annotation_hint: Set annotation to one image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the selected strip option panel.

task:candidate_solution_label_query.answer_instruction: the selected candidate-grid option letter as a string
task:candidate_solution_label_query.annotation_hint: Set annotation to one image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the selected candidate grid option panel.
